name: Pan Fried Onion Steaks
recipeIngredient: 2 red onion, cut into 1/2-inch thick slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut three 1/2-inch thick slices from the widest part of each onion. Reserve the remainder for another use.
2. Carefully arrange the onion slices in a single layer in a baking pan and pour milk over them to cover. Cover and chill for 3-4 hours, turning once to remove excess liquid.
3. Drain the onions well, allowing any excess liquid to drip off.
4. Coat the onions well with flour.
5. Heat oil and butter in a skillet over a moderate flame.
6. Add the onions and pan-fry until browned on both sides. Season with salt and pepper.
7. Serve hot.
